name: cleverbrush-framework
description: Cleverbrush Framework - a set of libraries used by Cleverbrush, a web-based publishing application

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build_async && npm run build_deep && npm run build_knex-clickhouse && npm run build_schema && npm run build_scheduler && npm run build_mapper && npm run build_react-form
scripts.clean: npm run clean_async && npm run clean_deep && npm run clean_knex-clickhouse && npm run clean_schema && npm run clean_scheduler && npm run clean_react-form
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run build && changeset publish
scripts.publish:beta: npm run clean && npm run build && changeset publish --tag beta

author: Andrew Zolotukhin <andrew_zol@cleverbrush.com>
